LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER ATTORNEY GENERAL KAMALA D. HARRIS ORDER TO SHOW CASE RE COMPLIANCE WITH INVESTIGATIVE SUBPOENAS. RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - PETITION TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE IS GRANTED. PETITIONER HAS SHOWN THAT THE SUBPOENAS WERE REGULARLY ISSUED IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE GOVERNMENT CODE. FURTHER RESPONDENT SHOULD PROVIDE A PRIVILEGE LOG WITH REGARD TO WITHHELD DOCUMENTS. THE PETITIONER HAS ALSO SHOWN THAT THE DOCUMENTS ARE REASONABLY RELEVANT TO ITS INVESTIGATION. RESPONDENTS OBJECTIONS UNDER HIPPA ARE UNFOUNDED. 45CFR 164.512(E) & (F) PERMIT DISCLOSURES IN RESPONSE TO LAW ENFORCEMENT AND ADMINISTRATIVE SUBPOENAS. RESPONDENT SHOULD PROVIDE COMPLETE, UNREDACTED FILES AND INFORMATION RELATED TO MEDICAL LOSS AND PREMIUMS. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/LMG) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

calendar.matters:
Order To Show Case Re Compliance With Investigative Subpoenas. (Per 03-03-11 Order)
Off Calendar Apr-04-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PETITIONER ATTORNEY GENERAL KAMALA D. HARRIS ORDER TO SHOW CASE RE COMPLIANCE WITH INVESTIGATIVE SUBPOENAS.

APPEARANCES: Danette E. Valdez, 703-5714, Paul E. Stein, 703-5740 & Alexandra Robert Gordon, 703-5509 Deputy Atty Generals for petitioner & moving party; John C. Holmes, Esq. of Barger & Wolen LLP 213/614-7316 for respondents & opposing parties.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - Petition to Compel Compliance is granted. Petitioner has shown that the subpoenas were regularly issued in accordance with the Government Code. Further Respondent should provide a privilege log with regard to withheld documents. The Petitioner has also shown that the documents are reasonably relevant to its investigation. Respondents objections under HIPPA are unfounded. 45CFR 164.512(e) & (f) permit disclosures in response to law enforcement and administrative subpoenas. Respondent should provide complete, unredacted files and information related to medical loss and premiums. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
